title: Why “magic links” and passcodes are taking over news logins
description: I grew up in India, which is increasingly a country that runs on OTPs, or one-time passcodes. I bump into them everywhere each time I visit: When trying to connect to airport WiFi, getting into an Uber, or accessing a digital menu at a cafe. But lately, if I’m homesick, I’ve found a way of...
